sub_mechanisms: M_1 Ricci-curvature estimator on loss-landscape patch
M_2 track curvature flow over training steps
M_3 detect basin transition via sign change
M_4 predict generalization from final basin curvature
stripped_llm_application: A loss-landscape diagnostic that tracks an estimated curvature signature analogous to Ricci flow through training to identify basin transitions and predict generalization.
novelty_claim_stripped: Existing Ricci-flow + deep learning (Nature 2024) uses Ricci flow as data-manifold smoothing. Candidate uses it on the loss-landscape (parameter-manifold) instead.
